description: List trace information. If no keywords are specified, all traces currently being taken are listed and their current locations.

keywords.name: limits
keywords.description: List the extent of position and velocity values taken for each trace.

keywords.name: series
keywords.description: List the specified particle trace series where more that one trace identifier can be specified.
